<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Zonisamide 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Zonegran is indicated as:  monotherapy in the treatment of partial seizures, with or without secondary generalisation, in adults with newly diagnosed epilepsy; adjunctive therapy in the treatment of...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Tourette syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（99.8%）</li>
<li>methemoglobinemia, alpha type（99.6%）</li>
<li>methemoglobinemia（99.6%）</li>
<li>Prinzmetal angina（99.5%）</li>
<li>methemoglobin reductase deficiency（99.5%）</li>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（99.3%）</li>
<li>absence epilepsy（99.2%）</li>
<li>fibromyalgia（99.2%）</li>
<li>conjunctivitis（99.2%）</li>
<li>trigeminal nerve neoplasm（99.2%）</li>
<li>multifocal atrial tachycardia (disease)（99.1%）</li>
<li>tendinitis（99.1%）</li>
<li>myositis fibrosa（99.1%）</li>
<li>idiopathic granulomatous myositis（99.1%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（99.0%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（99.0%）</li>
<li>visual epilepsy（99.0%）</li>
<li>idiopathic neonatal atrial flutter（98.9%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myositis（98.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
